results.rendered_html:
abhyāgata p. p.
1 Come near, approached, arrived; bhobhavānabhyāgato'tithiḥ  Pt. 4 ; kramādabhyāgataṃ dravyaṃ  Y. 2. 119 ; tasminnabhyā
(pb) gate kāle  Rām. 
2 Come as a guest; sarvatrābhyāgato guruḥ  H. 1. 108 ; śrotriyāya abhyāgatāya  U. 4 ;  Śi. 4. 68. 
— taḥ A guest, visitor; ˚kriyayā niyojitaḥ  Pt. 2 ;  K. 280 ;  Śi. 3. 81.
